project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: Fresh Windows hosts can git clone this repository, run elevated Setup-DeploymentServer.cmd unattended, open the local Web console, and continue runtime preparation from Web.

development.purpose: Active checkout for code, docs, tests, commits, pushes, and setup validation.

deployment_clone.purpose: Separate deployment-facing clone for runtime or PXE tests after pulling the pushed master commit.

host_management.purpose: Installed host-management bundle used by the deployment host after setup.

host_state.purpose: Mutable host-only state including local config, secrets, and staging after setup.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root selected in Web initialization; never located inside the Git clone.

development.summary: Setup now runs unattended after clone, defaults Web to 127.0.0.1:8080, auto-installs Node/npm plus OSD and OSDCloud host modules, and leaves ADK/WinPE/runtime work to Web Prepare runtime.

baseline.subject: chore: update status.json for 0.5.3 syslog feature

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

deployment_clone.required_update_before_tests: Before deployment or PXE tests from C:\osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab, run git pull --ff-only origin master and confirm that clone matches the pushed master commit.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web project-root selection, Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
after_development_push_before_tests: confirm this active checkout HEAD equals the pushed origin/master commit
forbidden: Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit the Web-selected deployment project root.
Do not commit generated deployment artifacts or local secrets.
Do not write deployment runtime files back into the Git clone.

recent_changes.summary:
- Redirected verbose stdout/stderr outputs from Prepare Runtime and Endpoint Sync processes to dedicated log files: C:\OSDCloud\logs\runtime-prepare.log and endpoint-sync.log.
- Wrote helper addOperationVerboseLog in serviceController.js to log raw syslog format to files and formatted output to Web UI.
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.4.
- Added unit tests to verify dedicated logging files and syslog formatting.

- Consolidated host-side service logs (DHCP, TFTP, HTTP, WEB-OP) into a single RFC 5424 Syslog file: logs/host-services.log.
- Wrote client-side progress status logs to per-run syslog files: logs/runs/<runId>/deployment.log.
- Duplicated client-side screenshots under logs/runs/<runId>/screenshots/.
- Implemented local offset timezone formatters and integrated Syslog header parsing to ensure Web UI console log display remains backward-compatible and clean.
- Added new test cases verifying Syslog formatting, file writes, and screenshot duplication.
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.3.

- Redesigned the Web console to a clean Google-style light minimalist design.
- Removed dark theme class and imported Google Font Roboto in index.html.
- Modified Tailwind config to use 8px (0.5rem) border-radius defaults and Roboto font mappings.
- Configured CSS colors to Google light palette (Google Blue accent, white cards, light gray background, light gray logs, charcoal primary text).
- Restyled buttons (warning as Google Blue primary, danger as Google Red primary, base/secondary as white with gray border).
- Custom styled header view tabs and operations buttons to resemble sidebar menu navigation items.
- Cleaned up and removed the obsolete macOS dark theme overrides block.
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.2.
- Verified all 214 unit tests pass successfully.

- Locked the OSDCloud runtime project root directory to C:\OSDCloud across the app.
- Removed selectable project root options from Web UI, setting the input element to readOnly/disabled.
- Updated updateProjectRoot API in serviceController.js to always force runtimeRoot to C:\OSDCloud.
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.1.
- Verified all unit and smoke tests pass (214/214).

- Implemented dynamic boot-config HTTP API endpoint in httpServer.js to serve server IP, SMB, and Davis OOBE credentials.
- Updated client-side WinPE Startup script (Start-OSDCloud-iPXE.ps1) with dynamic server IP probing (DHCP, Gateway, DNS) and boot-config fetching over HTTP, seeding secrets.json to RAM disk dynamically.
- Modified Set-OsdCloudIpxeEndpoint.ps1 to cleanly delete and recreate SMB firewall rules and skip redundant DISM WIM mount/commit cycles when the published boot.wim is already customized.
- Supported custom subnet overrides via new SmbRemoteSubnet parameter.
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.0.
- Verified all unit and smoke tests passed successfully.
recent_changes.verification: npm test and npm run smoke passed 213/213 successfully.
